global.description: The ad features a modern design with abstract shapes and clear text elements.
global.main_message: Encouraging users to book their next trip with special fares.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: Full canvas background of the mobile advertisement.

elements.label: Abstract shape
elements.description: A large, abstract shape in the center with a soft purple hue.

elements.label: Overlay shape
elements.description: A slightly smaller overlay shape in the center, also in a soft purple tone.

elements.label: Vertical shape
elements.description: A vertical shape in the center, featuring a muted purple color.

elements.label: Rectangular shape
elements.description: A rectangular shape in the center with a light purple background.

elements.label: Small circle
elements.description: A small circle at the bottom center, colored in a light shade of purple.

elements.label: Small oval
elements.description: A small oval shape positioned towards the bottom, in a light purple hue.

elements.label: Top logo
elements.description: A small logo positioned at the top, featuring the text 'WayPoint UGC' in bold.

elements.label: Center shape
elements.description: A medium-sized shape in the center with a light purple color.

elements.label: Main headline
elements.description: The text 'WayPoint UGC' is prominently displayed at the top in bold, large font.

elements.label: Trip booking text
elements.description: The text 'Book your next trip Special fares today' is centered at the bottom in a clear, readable font.
elements.text_content: Book your next trip Special fares today

elements.label: Call to action
elements.description: The text 'Learn more' is displayed in a button format at the bottom center, inviting interaction.

embedding_texts.layout_text: The headline is at the top, the main body text is centered, and the CTA is at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: WayPoint UGC, Book your next trip Special fares today, Learn more
